title: Phase 2A: Database schema - operational models (Order, Truck, Route, Delivery, Yard, Receiving)
description: Add operational models to Prisma schema: Order, OrderItem, OrderEvent with state machine enum; Truck, Route, RouteStop; DeliveryProof, CODCollection; PickupTicket; YardTask; ReceivingRecord, ReceivingLine, VerificationReview.
steps: Add Order model with state machine status enum, customer/branch links, totals, dates
Add OrderItem model with product, quantity, pricing, readiness status
Add OrderEvent model for state transition audit trail
Add Truck model with capacity (weight, pieces, bundles, length), status, driver assignment
Add Route model with date, truck, sequence, profitability score
Add RouteStop model with order, sequence, ETA, status, outcome
Add DeliveryProof model with signature, photos, GPS, timestamp
Add CODCollection model with amount due, collected, payment type, shortage reason
Add PickupTicket model with customer, order, lane, bay, status, prep timer
Add YardTask model with type, priority, assignment, bay, status
Define all operational enums (OrderStatus, StopOutcome, YardTaskType, ReceivingLineStatus, etc.)
